meta.author: AI Storyteller
meta.style: cute watercolor children's illustration, soft pastel colors, vertical 9:16 composition

pages.prompt: A cute orange fox sitting under a rainbow umbrella in a colorful autumn forest, surrounded by pink and orange flowers, butterflies, and magical sparkles

zh: 小狐狸在森林里捡到了一张藏宝图
en: Little Fox found a treasure map in the forest
"I'm going on an adventure!" he said happily
pages.prompt: A cute orange fox discovering a rolled-up treasure map on a forest path, with tall colorful trees and scattered autumn leaves, curious expression
A cute orange fox in a lush green forest with butterflies, three bright red flowers glowing among green foliage, birch trees with pink blossoms
A cute orange fox and a green frog standing on stepping stones in a river pond, lily pads with pink flowers, dragonflies, weeping willow tree, blue sky
A cute orange fox flying through pastel pink and blue clouds with a small yellow bird, glowing stars, soap bubbles, rainbow at the bottom, dreamy sky
A cute orange fox standing on a green hilltop with colorful mushrooms of different sizes, rainbow arc in the sky, wildflowers, fluffy white clouds
A cute orange fox exploring a magical dark blue cave with glowing blue crystals, sparkles, mysterious rock formations, bioluminescent plants

zh: “有一片雪花很特别！你找到了吗？”
en: "One snowflake is special! Can you find it?"
pages.prompt: A cute orange fox in a snowy winter wonderland, falling snowflakes of various shapes, one special golden snowflake, ice crystals, pine trees with snow

en: "Sort the flowers from small to big!"
pages.prompt: A cute orange fox in a magical flower garden with flowers of various sizes from tiny to huge, colorful roses and daisies, butterflies, garden path

zh: 天空出现了一道美丽的彩虹！
en: A beautiful rainbow appeared in the sky!
pages.prompt: A cute orange fox looking up at a magnificent rainbow in the sky, seven glowing stars forming a constellation, magical golden light, celebration atmosphere
A cute orange fox celebrating with animal friends (frog, bird, butterfly) in a rainbow castle, confetti, balloons, happy expressions, warm golden light
